signals.headline: US Nears $20 Billion Deal with Iran to Surrender Uranium Stockpile | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Nears $20 Billion Deal with Iran to Surrender Uranium Stockpile | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Reports on April 17, 2026, confirm the U.S. is close to a deal for Iran to surrender its uranium, with weekend talks expected, triggering a crypto rally as risk assets surged.[3]  
Bitcoin hit $76,370 and Ethereum reached near $2,400 on this de-escalation, amid falling oil prices; Ethereum jumped 14% wee

signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 inflation rose to 2
signals.raw: South Korea's March 2026 inflation rose to 2.2% year-on-year**, up from 2.0% in February but below the market consensus of 2.4%[1][2][3]. This was driven primarily by rising global oil prices, though government fuel price caps and food vouchers helped limit the increase[1][3].
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: The Bank of Korea held its policy rate steady at 2
signals.raw: The Bank of Korea held its policy rate steady at 2.5%** and is expected to maintain this through at least August, taking a "wait-and-see approach" as it evaluates whether external energy shocks will intensify[1][2].

signals.headline: Key risks for inflation remain tilted upward**: Oil prices have surged past $100 per barrel due to the Iran conflict, an
signals.raw:
Key risks for inflation remain tilted upward**: Oil prices have surged past $100 per barrel due to the Iran conflict, and economists warn that even at March's controlled fuel price levels, annual inflation could exceed 2.5% in coming months[3].
